testcase.name: loginShouldAuthenticateAndReturnAuthResponse
testcase.system-out: 18:05:19.707 [main] INFO com.vms.service.AuthService -- User login@example.com logged in successfully 18:05:19.714 [main] INFO com.vms.service.AuthService -- Generated token for user login@example.com: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJsb2dpbkBleGFtcGxlLmNvbSIsImlhdCI6MTc4MzE2ODUxOSwiZXhwIjoxNzgzMTcyMTE5fQ.NvVMSJELJnlBS1RrygLLMRQSBCapnakkkJ6MFy-90h0

testcase.name: registerShouldSaveUserAndReturnAuthResponse
testcase.system-out: 18:05:19.754 [main] INFO com.vms.service.AuthService -- User user@example.com registered successfully 18:05:19.755 [main] INFO com.vms.service.AuthService -- Generated token for user user@example.com: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJ1c2VyQGV4YW1wbGUuY29tIiwiaWF0IjoxNzgzMTY4NTE5LCJleHAiOjE3ODMxNzIxMTl9.8nNkFq8grR9xtiL-f2enaLwb16fUEo7EI75x-HWsG54
